{{Infobox character
| name = Pariana
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Titan, Abidan
| abilities = Presence, construct containment fields
| affiliations = Second Division
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Pariana is a member of the [[Abidan]] and was formerly the final [[Abidan]] stationed in [[Sector]] Ninety-[[Eight]] of a nameless world. Physically, she is distinct from standard humans, standing three meters tall with golden skin and a bald head. Her abilities involve manipulating the [[Way]] to create protective barriers, containment fields, and complex formations using various colored runes. During her service in [[Sector]] Ninety-[[Eight]], she demonstrated the ability to use her [[Presence]]—a silver mass within her mind—to restore herself and others. Following the [[Collapse]], she developed an idolization of [[Suriel]]. After her time in [[Sector]] Ninety-[[Eight]], she was promoted to the rank of two-star [[Titan]] and joined a new squad where she utilized her skills in maintaining formations.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A [[Titan]] and an [[Abidan]], Pariana possesses a tall, golden body and projects a distinct [[Presence]]. Clad in white-plated armor, she serves as the designer of the formations. Throughout her existence, her specialty has never been violence.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] is a [[Titan]] and an [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]]'s specialty has never been violence.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] wears white-plated armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] is the designer of the formations.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] has a [[Presence]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]] has a tall, golden body.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]] can [[construct]] containment fields.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]]'s restrictive symbols include lines in her gold, the pure blue of the [[Way]], and alien pink Silverlord script.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Pariana]] is a member of the [[Second Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Constructing containment field!” Pariana reported, spreading her hands.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
